---
title: "Camila Pacheco Riaño, PhD"
description: "Personal website of Camila Pacheco-Riaño, global change ecologist and biogeographer at the University of Gothenburg."
about:
  template: trestles
  image: media/IO.jpg
  links:
    - text: "{{< iconify simple-icons:bluesky >}} @lacapary"
      href: https://bsky.app/profile/lacapary.bsky.social
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/lacapary/
    - text: "{{< ai researchgate >}} Researchgate"
      href: https://www.researchgate.net/profile/L-Camila-Pacheco-Riano
    - text: "{{< ai google-scholar >}} Google Scholar"
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=EsZhToUAAAAJ&hl=en
    - text: "{{< ai orcid >}} ORCID"
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0002-8539-4816
    - icon: twitter-x
      text: "@lacapary"
      href: https://twitter.com/lacapary

---

### Hi there!

I'm glad you've found your way to my webpage. As an ecologist who specializes in biogeography, I'm passionate about understanding how living things are distributed across the planet and the factors that shape those patterns. Thank you for stopping by!


## Contact 

  
  * Office: Medicinaregatan 7B 41390 Göteborg

<center>
  <a href="mailto:pachecoriano.c@gmail.com?subject=Subject&body=Body%20Text" class="btn btn-outline-primary" role="button">
    <i class="fa fa-envelope"></i> Email Me
  </a>
  &nbsp;
  <a href="media/CV_L_Camila Pacheco_Riaño.pdf" download="cv.pdf" class="btn btn-outline-primary" role="button">
    <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-person"></i> Download CV
  </a>
</center>

<br>
<p style="text-align: center;">*I'll be happy to get in touch!* </p>
